name: Tom Yum Goong (Hot and Sour Soup)
recipeIngredient: 3 small Hot red chilies (seeds and ribs removed)
2 Stems fresh coriander leaves - for garnish
recipeInstructions:
Note: Save shells from the shrimp, including heads, if available.
1. Shell and devein the shrimp, reserving heads and shells.
2. Place the shells and heads in a large saucepan.
3. Add water, lemongrass, and galanga ginger to the saucepan.
4. Using a mortar and pestle, pound two chilies with coriander roots.
5. Add the pounded mixture to the pan along with salt and five shredded lime leaves.
6. Bring the soup to a boil and simmer uncovered for 20 to 25 minutes.
7. Strain the stock into a clean pan (taste may not be perfect yet).
8. A few minutes before serving, bring the stock back to a boil and add shrimp, cooking for 2 to 3 minutes.
9. Add Nam pla, lemon juice, and lime juice; stir to combine.
10. Adjust seasoning as needed. The flavor should be tangy.
11. Serve in bowls garnished with remaining chili strips, shredded lime leaves, and coriander leaves.
